MINI MINUTES: JOINT MOTION TO DISMISS

Appearances via Zoom:
Jennifer Leinbach of the Wilshire Law Firm (213.381.9988, Jennifer.leinbach@wilshirelawfirm.com) for plaintiff Ronnie Biddle III;
Joseph Lewis of Morgan Lewis & Bockius LLP (415.442.1000, joseph.lewis@morganlewis.com) for defendant Unifi Aviation, LLC
